잠언 18:1.content: A man who isolates himself pursues selfishness, and defies all sound judgment.

잠언 18:2.content: A fool has no delight in understanding, but only in revealing his own opinion.

잠언 18:3.content: When wickedness comes, contempt also comes, and with shame comes disgrace.

잠언 18:4.content: The words of a man’s mouth are like deep waters. The fountain of wisdom is like a flowing brook.

잠언 18:5.content: To be partial to the faces of the wicked is not good, nor to deprive the innocent of justice.

잠언 18:6.content: A fool’s lips come into strife, and his mouth invites beatings.

잠언 18:7.content: A fool’s mouth is his destruction, and his lips are a snare to his soul.

잠언 18:8.content: The words of a gossip are like dainty morsels: they go down into a person’s innermost parts.

잠언 18:9.content: One who is slack in his work is brother to him who is a master of destruction.

잠언 18:10.content: Yahweh’s name is a strong tower: the righteous run to him, and are safe.

잠언 18:11.content: The rich man’s wealth is his strong city, like an unscalable wall in his own imagination.

잠언 18:12.content: Before destruction the heart of man is proud, but before honor is humility.

잠언 18:13.content: He who answers before he hears, that is folly and shame to him.

잠언 18:14.content: A man’s spirit will sustain him in sickness, but a crushed spirit, who can bear?

잠언 18:15.content: The heart of the discerning gets knowledge. The ear of the wise seeks knowledge.

잠언 18:16.content: A man’s gift makes room for him, and brings him before great men.

잠언 18:17.content: He who pleads his cause first seems right; until another comes and questions him.

잠언 18:18.content: The lot settles disputes, and keeps strong ones apart.

잠언 18:19.content: A brother offended is more difficult than a fortified city. Disputes are like the bars of a fortress.

잠언 18:20.content: A man’s stomach is filled with the fruit of his mouth. With the harvest of his lips he is satisfied.

잠언 18:21.content: Death and life are in the power of the tongue; those who love it will eat its fruit.

잠언 18:22.content: Whoever finds a wife finds a good thing, and obtains favor of Yahweh.

잠언 18:23.content: The poor plead for mercy, but the rich answer harshly.

잠언 18:24.content: A man of many companions may be ruined, but there is a friend who sticks closer than a brother.
